title: "Healthy Youth, Strong Nation": Swami Vivekananda Jayanti Free Medical & Wellness Camp
description: In celebration of National Youth Day, a mega health check-up camp was organized to serve the Tadakod community. The event offered a range of free services, including general physical examinations, BP and sugar screenings, and specialized consultations for women and children. Guided by the philosophy that "Strength is Life," the camp aimed to empower the local youth with health awareness and nutritional guidance. The medical team provided one-on-one counseling, ensuring that every participant left with a better understanding of their well-being and necessary follow-up care.
objective: To honor the birth anniversary of Swami Vivekananda by providing accessible healthcare services and promoting the importance of physical fitness and preventive medicine among the youth and residents of Tadakod.
total_beneficiaries: Approximately 350+ residents, including local students, farmers, and senior citizens of Tadakod.
guests:
Chief Guest: Smt. Doddavva Karikatti (President, Gram Panchayat, Tadakod)

Guest of Honor: Shri Bheemappa Kaasayi
